requirement_topic.en: URSEC Mandatory Homologación (Radio & Telecom Terminal Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: URSEC强制合规认证（无线电及电信终端设备）
requirement_topic.zht: URSEC強制合規認證（無線電及電信終端裝置）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices — must obtain URSEC homologación (type approval) before import or sale in Uruguay. Required under Ley 17.296 and applicable URSEC resolutions. The applicant must submit a technical file with accredited laboratory test reports; CE and FCC reports may be accepted as a basis but do not substitute for URSEC approval. CCC is not recognised. The URSEC certificate number and URSEC mark must appear on the product label. Approval is device-model specific.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备——在乌拉圭进口或销售前须取得URSEC合规认证（型号认证）。依据Ley 17.296及相关URSEC决议的要求。申请人须提交含认可实验室检测报告的技术文件；CE和FCC报告可作为基础被接受，但不能替代URSEC批准。CCC不被承认。产品标签须标注URSEC证书编号及URSEC标志。认证针对具体设备型号。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端裝置——包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置——在烏拉圭進口或銷售前須取得URSEC合規認證（型號認證）。依據Ley 17.296及相關URSEC決議的要求。申請人須提交含認可實驗室檢測報告的技術文件；CE和FCC報告可作為基礎被接受，但不能替代URSEC批准。CCC不被承認。產品標籤須標注URSEC證書編號及URSEC標誌。認證針對具體裝置型號。

standards_or_laws: Ley 17.296 (Ley de Presupuesto Nacional — establishes URSEC mandate)
URSEC resolutions on homologación of radio and telecom terminal equipment
URSEC Technical Requirements for radio equipment

summary.en: China requires MIIT type approval (network access licence — NAL) for telecom terminal equipment and SRRC type approval for radio transmitters, along with CCC certification for relevant product categories. These are not recognised by URSEC and do not substitute for Uruguayan homologación.
summary.zh: 中国对电信终端设备要求MIIT型号核准（入网许可证）、对无线电发射设备要求SRRC型号核准，相关产品类别还需取得CCC认证。URSEC不承认上述认证，其不能替代乌拉圭合规认证。
summary.zht: 中國對電信終端裝置要求MIIT型號核准（入網許可證）、對無線電發射裝置要求SRRC型號核准，相關產品類別還需取得CCC認證。URSEC不承認上述認證，其不能替代烏拉圭合規認證。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecom Terminal Equipment

gap.en: Full gap. URSEC homologación is a separate mandatory approval; SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC are not recognised. A new technical file with accredited lab reports must be prepared; CE or FCC test reports may help reduce retesting costs but cannot replace the URSEC submission.
gap.zh: 完全差距。URSEC合规认证是单独的强制性批准；SRRC、MIIT NAL及CCC均不被承认。须准备含认可实验室报告的全新技术文件；CE或FCC检测报告有助于降低重新检测成本，但不能替代URSEC申请材料。
gap.zht: 完全差距。URSEC合規認證是單獨的強制性批准；SRRC、MIIT NAL及CCC均不被承認。須準備含認可實驗室報告的全新技術文件；CE或FCC檢測報告有助於降低重新檢測成本，但不能替代URSEC申請材料。

source.publisher: URSEC — Unidad Reguladora de Servicios de Comunicaciones

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] URSEC homologación is mandatory for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices before import or sale in Uruguay. Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised. Budget time and cost for a fresh URSEC technical file submission; CE or FCC test reports may be used as a basis. Verify current URSEC procedures and fees with a qualified Uruguayan regulatory agent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] URSEC合规认证对Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备在乌拉圭进口或销售前为强制要求。中国的SRRC、MIIT NAL及CCC批准不被承认。需为全新URSEC技术文件申请预留时间和费用；CE或FCC检测报告可作为基础。请与合格的乌拉圭监管代理核验现行URSEC程序和费用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] URSEC合規認證對Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置在烏拉圭進口或銷售前為強制要求。中國的SRRC、MIIT NAL及CCC批准不被承認。需為全新URSEC技術文件申請預留時間和費用；CE或FCC檢測報告可作為基礎。請與合格的烏拉圭監管代理核驗現行URSEC程序和費用。
